name: ccplugins
description: Custom Claude Code plugins by prefrontalsys

plugins.name: thinking-partner
plugins.description: Always-on thinking partner output style with Insight blocks and Notable blocks. Merges exploratory dialogue stance with educational code insights.

plugins.name: vault-aware-style
plugins.description: Vault-aware output style: educational insights + automatic vault orchestration (finalize, memorize, recall, skill dispatch)

plugins.name: doer
plugins.description: Execution specialist for mechanical tasks: bash ops, file management, GitHub operations, Ansible, repetitive changes. Haiku-tier for speed.

plugins.name: editor
plugins.description: Essay and long-form prose editor. Identifies structural issues, AI writing tells, argument flow problems. Preserves authorial voice.

plugins.name: planner
plugins.description: Software architect for implementation planning. Step-by-step plans, file mapping, architectural trade-offs. Use before coding multi-file tasks.

plugins.name: prompter
plugins.description: Expert prompt engineer. Takes any topic or request and produces a detailed, effective prompt for another LLM to execute.

plugins.name: searcher
plugins.description: Web and academic search specialist. Uses exa, Semantic Scholar, arxiv, DeepWiki, and Context7 for information retrieval.

plugins.name: sherlock
plugins.description: Deductive debugging agent. Diagnoses bugs through systematic elimination, citing evidence for each ruled-out possibility until only the cause remains.

plugins.name: thinker
plugins.description: Deep reasoning agent for architectural decisions, multi-step hypothesis evaluation, and structured uncertainty analysis.

plugins.name: worker
plugins.description: General-purpose Sonnet agent for coding, file ops, research, and moderate reasoning. The default when uncertain which agent to use.

plugins.name: prose-style
plugins.description: Prose-first output style: longform writing, interlocutor mode, paragraph-first output, casual-authoritative voice (Ars Technica + Aeon).
